rules.rule: Every review comment must cite a rule ID from the Standard.
Architectural concerns (ERROR) must be separated from style concerns (WARNING/INFO).
Review comments must not express personal preference — every comment must cite a rule.
Each review comment must identify the Standard layer affected.
Suggest the smallest code change that satisfies the violated rule.
Block any PR that bypasses Standard layers — component calling broker directly, etc.
Flag React Developer Tools / React Doctor warnings about hooks, re-renders, or missing keys.
AI-generated or scaffolded code must satisfy all Standard rules — do not approve violations simply because code was generated.
